title: Ion Trapping Fundamentals: Confining Charged Particles
description: Understand the physics of ion trapping using Paul traps and Penning traps. Learn how electromagnetic fields create stable confinement for atomic ions used as qubits.
learningObjectives: Explain why static electric fields alone cannot trap charged particles (Earnshaw's theorem)
Describe the principle of the Paul trap and derive the Mathieu equation
Understand secular and micromotion in RF traps
Compare Paul traps and Penning traps for quantum computing
Calculate trap frequencies from electrode geometry and voltages
